creator: devnull@apt322.org
text:
Created attachment 254237
Patch for anope with mysql module

Hello,

Firstly, I'm sorry for the big delay. I had several serious health issues this year.

This patch fixes anope runtime issues with localizing mysql libraries.
Also, pkg-descr was updated at the request of upstream.

QA tests passed.
Tested in runtime and build. Tested using poudriere jail on FreeBSD 14.1.
Poudriere build logs: http://poudriere2.apt322.org/data/jpoudriere-development/2024-10-13_01h47m38s/logs/anope-2.0.16.log
